About Me

Sculptor at heart,
digital native
by evolution.

I'm Revathy P.R., a multidisciplinary artist from Kerala with roots in fine art sculpture (BFA) and a specialisation in 3D animation and multimedia (M.Sc). My practice bridges the tactile world of physical form and the infinite possibilities of digital craft.

At High Heads Private Limited in Zirakpur, I create designer garments in CLO3D and explore emerging creative technologies — from AI-generated video to product listings, banners, and social media content. Every pixel, polygon, and prompt is shaped with intention.
